Name: Cardiology
Description: Specializes in diagnosis and treatment of heart and cardiovascular conditions.

Name: Orthopedics
Description: Focuses on musculoskeletal system disorders including bones, joints, and ligaments.

Name: Pediatrics
Description: Provides medical care for infants, children, and adolescents.

Name: Neurology
Description: Handles disorders of the nervous system including brain and spinal cord.

Name: Dermatology
Description: Diagnoses and treats conditions related to skin, hair, and nails.
